subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and its contents testified to thy servitude unto the Incomparable Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون چون دلالت بر عبودیت حضرت بیچون مینمود
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
